{{CargoOrgan
|name=Tonsil of Gaia
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10885
|idx=96
|description=Earth's Will was dismembered by Demon Gods. Some organs were retrieved and given as Reconstruction Feast rewards.
|skill=
|hp=2960
|def=227
|atk=199
|rush=348
|gene1=Water DMG +120
|gene2=Lifesteal Rate +20%
|gene3=Lifesteal Effect +20%
|gene4=Water RES +120
|gene5=Lifesteal Rate +20%
|gene6=Lifesteal Effect +20%
|gene7=Water DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
